name: Qingdao Topscomm Communication INC.
summary: Qingdao Topscomm Communication INC. designs, researches and develops, manufactures, and sells smart products for electric power and fire protection primarily in China. The company offers smart energy meters, such as smart prepayment and advanced metering infrastructure (AMI), and conventional meters; communication terminals, including data collectors and concentrators, and communication converters; energy data acquisition, distribution automation, power quality, and renewable energy systems; and communication chips and modules. It also provides AMI, prepayment vending, water/gas/heat and electricity meter AMR/AMI, distribution automation and management, and low and medium voltage PLC communication solutions. In addition, the company offers billing management, photovoltaic power management, and wind turbine control systems; and data collection operation and maintenance, line loss management, engineering installation, operation and distribution coordination, and power design services. Its products are used in the fields of smart grid, smart metering, new energy, fire protection, smart home, etc. Qingdao Topscomm Communication INC. was founded in 2008 and is headquartered in Qingdao, China.
